title: Inheritance PASS: [107] QA_CORE_SPEC.v1 → [115] QA_OBSTRUCTION_STACK_CERT.v1
_fixture_purpose: Certifies the kernel inheritance edge for [115], the obstruction stack synthesis family. [115] is a family_extension of [107] that adds stack-specific failure types (ARITHMETIC_REF_MISMATCH, CONTROL_REF_MISMATCH, PLANNER_REF_MISMATCH, EFFICIENCY_REF_MISMATCH, OBSTRUCTION_VERDICT_WRONG, PRUNING_CONCLUSION_MISMATCH, EFFICIENCY_CONCLUSION_MISMATCH, STACK_INCONSISTENCY) on top of the kernel failure algebra. IC5 fires (child failure algebra is a proper superset). IC6-IC7 skipped (no logging contract or invariant refs in [115] v1). Closes the formal obstruction chain: [111]→[112]→[113]→[114]→[115].
